name: openclaw-hma-runtime
description: Runtime executor for openclaw-hma skill pack. v0.1 delegates to legacy production code; v0.2 will be a full ESM port.

scripts.lint: node -c bin/master.mjs && node -c bin/listing.mjs && node -c bin/aplus.mjs && node -c bin/video.mjs && node -c bin/precheck.mjs && node -c bin/single-skill.mjs && node -c lib/legacy-bridge.mjs && echo Lint OK
